items.title: Jon Jones gives his side of viral road altercation video and says he is ‘glad’
items.summary: Jon Jones has addressed the viral road altercation that placed him back under scrutiny, offering a sharply different version of events to the one circulating online. The footage, recorded in Albuquerque, New Mexico, using Meta Glasses, shows ‘Bones’ confronting driver Bryan Beltran during a heated roadside exchange.
items.source_name: Yahoo! Sports - News, Scores, Standings, Rumors, Fantasy Games
